title: 文字化け・UTF-8・BOMのトラブル
desc: 10〜20件の悩みをまとめて解決する読み物＋ツール
problem_summaries: [GitHub] [BUG] BOM UTF-8 récurrent dans mcp_settings.json - Reprendre en main l'encodage OS/terminal
[GitHub] Windows: Bash tool garbles output from native Windows commands due to UTF-16LE encoding mismatch
[GitHub] Bug report: PowerShell parser errors running rog-ally-debloater.ps1 (-DryRun) on Windows PowerShell 5.1
[GitHub] VS Code PowerShell extension fails to detect corrupted UTF‑8 Chinese strings, causing silent syntax corruption
[GitHub] PS1 scripts compatibility with default Windows PowerShell 5.1 (Windows 10/11)
[GitHub] Persistent mojibake and control character issues across codebase
[GitHub] [FEATURE] Allow users to configure which shell the Bash tool uses or inherit initial shell
[GitHub] Bug: isBinaryFile misclassifies UTF-16/32 files with BOM as binary, causing context ingestion failure
conclusion_steps: まず結論：最短の対処方針を 3〜7 ステップで
fallbacks: それでも直らない：代替策1
それでも直らない：別ルート2
